import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './XAIPanel.css'; export default function XAIPanel({ fund, profile }) { const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true); const shap = fund.shap_features || {}; const shapEntries = Object.entries(shap).sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b[1]) - Math.abs(a[1])); const maxVal = Math.max(...shapEntries.map(([_, v]) => Math.abs(v)), 0.001); const featureLabels = { '1yr_return': '1-Year Return Performance', '3yr_return': '3-Year Return Performance', '5yr_return': '5-Year Return Performance', '10yr_return': '10-Year Return Performance', 'risk_alignment': 'Risk Profile Alignment', 'fund_type_match': 'Fund Type Match', 'investment_type': 'Investment Type Bonus', }; const featureIcons = { '1yr_return': '­¤ōł', '3yr_return': '­¤ōŖ', '5yr_return': '­¤ōē', '10yr_return': '­¤Åå', 'risk_alignment': '­¤øĪ’ĖÅ', 'fund_type_match': '­¤Ä»', 'investment_type': '­¤Æ░', }; const riskLabel = { low: { text: 'Conservative', color: '#2DCE89', desc: 'Prioritises capital safety' }, medium: { text: 'Balanced', color: '#F0A500', desc: 'Balances growth and safety' }, high: { text: 'Aggressive', color: '#F5365C', desc: 'Maximises growth potential' }, }; const r = riskLabel[profile.risk_appetite] || riskLabel.medium; return (
setExpanded(!expanded)}>

'#F0A500' : '#F5365C' }, { label: 'AI Confidence', value: `${fund.confidence?.toFixed(0)}%`, pct: fund.confidence, color: '#00B4D8' }, { label: 'Recommendation Score', value: `${fund.recommendation_score?.toFixed(0)}/100`, pct: fund.recommendation_score, color: '#F0A500' }, ].map((m) => (
